sentences.target: Ich kann dir mein Buch leihen.

translations.de: Ich kann dir mein Buch leihen.
translations.en: I can lend you my book.
translations.fr: Je peux te prêter mon livre.
translations.zh-Hans: 我可以把我的书借给你。
translations.ru: Я могу одолжить тебе свою книгу.
translations.he: אני יכול להשאיל לך את הספר שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi có thể cho bạn mượn cuốn sách của tôi.
translations.nl: Ik kan je mijn boek uitlenen.
translations.uk: Я можу позичити тобі свою книжку.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें अपनी किताब उधार दे सकता हूँ.
translations.el: Μπορώ να σου δανείσω το βιβλίο μου.
translations.nb: Jeg kan låne deg boka mi.
translations.id: Saya bisa meminjamkan buku saya kepadamu.
translations.sv: Jag kan låna ut min bok till dig.
translations.da: Jeg kan låne dig min bog.
translations.ja: 本を貸してあげられるよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects the infinitive 'leihen'.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of 'leihen'.
Possessive determiner, modifies 'Buch'; neuter accusative singular.
Common noun, neuter, singular, accusative; direct object of 'leihen'.
Infinitive verb; complements modal 'kann'; ditransitive, taking dative and accusative.

sentences.target: Meine Nachbarin will mir ihren Bohrer leihen.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈnaxbaʁɪn vɪl miːɐ̯ ˈiːʁən ˈboːʁɐ ˈlaɪ̯ən/

translations.de: Meine Nachbarin will mir ihren Bohrer leihen.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈnaxbaʁɪn vɪl miːɐ̯ ˈiːʁən ˈboːʁɐ ˈlaɪ̯ən/
translations.en: My neighbor wants to lend me her drill.
translations.es: Mi vecina quiere prestarme su taladro.
translations.fr: Ma voisine veut me prêter sa perceuse.
translations.it: La mia vicina vuole prestarmi il suo trapano.
translations.ko: 이웃이 내게 드릴을 빌려 주려고 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的女邻居想把她的电钻借给我。
translations.yue: 我個女鄰居想借佢部電鑽畀我。
translations.ru: Моя соседка хочет одолжить мне свою дрель.
translations.pt: Minha vizinha quer me emprestar sua furadeira.
translations.he: השכנה שלי רוצה להשאיל לי את המקדחה שלה.
translations.tr: Komşum bana matkabını ödünç vermek istiyor.
translations.vi: Chị hàng xóm muốn cho tôi mượn cái máy khoan của chị ấy.
translations.nl: Mijn buurvrouw wil me haar boormachine uitlenen.
translations.uk: Моя сусідка хоче позичити мені свій дриль.
translations.hu: A szomszédnőm szeretné nekem kölcsönadni a fúrógépét.
translations.hi: मेरी पड़ोसन मुझे अपना ड्रिल उधार देना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Moja sąsiadka chce pożyczyć mi swoją wiertarkę.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισά μου θέλει να μου δανείσει το τρυπάνι της.
translations.nb: Naboen min vil låne meg drillen sin.
translations.id: Tetangga perempuan saya ingin meminjamkan bornya kepada saya.
translations.sv: Min granne vill låna ut sin borrmaskin till mig.
translations.ro: Vecina mea vrea să-mi împrumute bormașina ei.
translations.cs: Moje sousedka mi chce půjčit svou vrtačku.
translations.da: Min nabo vil låne mig sin boremaskine.
translations.ja: 近所の人が私にドリルを貸してくれる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine nominative singular to agree with 'Nachbarin'.
Common noun, feminine, singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects infinitive.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of 'leihen'.
Possessive determiner; masculine accusative singular agreeing with 'Bohrer'.
Common noun, masculine, singular, accusative; direct object of 'leihen'.
Infinitive complementing modal 'will'; ditransitive verb.

sentences.target: Morgen möchte ich mir das Fahrrad leihen.

translations.de: Morgen möchte ich mir das Fahrrad leihen.
translations.ipa: /ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈmœçtə ɪç mɪɐ̯ das ˈfaːʁʁaːt ˈlaɪ̯ən/
translations.en: Tomorrow I want to borrow the bike.
translations.es: Mañana quiero pedir prestada la bici.
translations.fr: Demain je veux emprunter le vélo.
translations.it: Domani voglio prendere in prestito la bici.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天我想借那辆自行车。
translations.pt: Amanhã quero pegar a bicicleta emprestada.
translations.he: מחר אני רוצה לשאול את האופניים.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi muốn mượn chiếc xe đạp.
translations.nl: Morgen wil ik de fiets lenen.
translations.hi: कल मैं साइकिल उधार लेना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Αύριο θέλω να δανειστώ το ποδήλατο.
translations.nb: I morgen vil jeg låne sykkelen.
translations.id: Besok saya mau meminjam sepeda itu.
translations.ro: Mâine vreau să iau bicicleta cu împrumut.
translations.da: I morgen vil jeg låne cyklen.
translations.ja: 明日、自転車を借りたい。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; indicates when the action takes place.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II of 'mögen'), selects infinitive.
Personal pronoun, nominative singular; subject.
Reflexive dative pronoun; beneficiary in 'mir etwas leihen'.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular for 'Fahrrad'.
Common noun, neuter, singular, accusative; direct object.
Infinitive verb; complements 'möchte'; transitive.

translations.it: Deve prendere in prestito dei soldi.
translations.ro: Trebuie să ia bani cu împrumut.
translations.da: Han er nødt til at låne penge.
translations.ja: 彼はお金を借りなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, selects infinitive.
Reflexive pronoun, dative; marks the borrower in 'sich Geld leihen'.
Common noun, neuter, mass, accusative; direct object.
Infinitive verb; complements 'muss'; ditransitive.

es: Mi vecina quiere prestarme su taladro.
Mañana quiero pedir prestada la bici.

Ma voisine veut me prêter sa perceuse.
Demain je veux emprunter le vélo.

Domani voglio prendere in prestito la bici.
Deve prendere in prestito dei soldi.
